trajectory_summary: This recording contains no customer interaction. The transcript is entirely floor ambient audio — equipment troubleshooting, colleague crosstalk, and background chatter about a video game. No sales call occurred within this recording. There is no trajectory to assess, no customer state to track, and no outcome to dispute or confirm.
outcome_dispute: The v1 outcome tag is listed as 'unknown,' which is accurate in the narrow sense, but the correct classification is 'no call' — no customer was ever on the line. This is not an incomplete or abandoned call; it is a misfiled recording of floor ambient audio.

primary_coaching_focus.quote: Damn. I didn't even realize my cord was all messed up.
primary_coaching_focus.why: The rep was unaware the call was being recorded while troubleshooting equipment and engaging in floor banter. On a live floor where every dialer session is logged, reps need to treat every open line as potentially active. This is an ops and floor-discipline conversation, not a sales technique conversation — but it belongs in the 1-on-1 because the rep's unawareness of a live recording is a real exposure.

key_moments.quote: Damn. I didn't even realize my cord was all messed up.
